sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, str_value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str_value) VALUES (1, 'hello world');
UPDATE test_strings SET str_value = substring(str_value, 7) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT substring(str_value, 1) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, substring(str_value, 2) AS extracted FROM test_strings;
